final:
module top_alu_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input [1:0] op,
    output reg [3:0] result);always @(*) begin
        case (op)
            2'b00: result <= a + b;
            2'b01: result <= a - b;
            2'b10: result <= a & b;
            2'b11: result <= a | b;
        endcase
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      result <= ~a;
    end
  end

endmodule
